17481: Baron Rivendare in Stratholme (dead side): a famous multi-year grind—expect many clears for the skeletal horse.
25953: Temple of Ahn’Qiraji silithid mount: tied to raid-era drops and reputation; Wowhead lists how it works in Retail today.
24252: Legacy Zul’Gurub rare boss drop—check whether it still drops and from which difficulty/rotation.
40192: Kael’thas in Tempest Keep (The Eye): still one of the most iconic low-odds raid mounts.
60002: Storm Peaks rare spawn: competition and long camps—track NPC id timers in a community timer/discord.
62048: Outdoor / world-content drop in current expansions—group up and confirm which boss drops it on Wowhead (rotations change).
72286: The Lich King (Icecrown Citadel) heroic-era prestige—still a long-haul weekly lockout chase for many.
98727: Shop flyer: golden winged guardian—no in-game farm; watch for sales, bundles, or balance promotions.
110051: Shop dragon bundle—pure purchase, so it tops “ease” lists without touching raid RNG.
153489: Shop serpent—historically tied to a regional promo; in Retail it’s usually just the shop checkout.
163024: Shop felsteed variant—same story as other store mounts: money or promotional balance, not a boss drop.
180545: Shop runesaber—another checkout mount; good if you want zero lockout friction.
32245: Listed as a rare drop in data—verify current source on Wowhead (legacy world/raid quirks happen).
63796: Ulduar/Yogg-Saron prestige: Mimiron's Head still turns heads—confirm which difficulties and legacy loot rules drop it in Retail, then plan a weekly clear.
127170: Throne of Thunder endboss serpent—raid drop with weekly lockout energy; verify personal vs legacy loot on Wowhead before you commit to a group.
171828: Draenor world-boss style rare: Solar Spirehawk is about spawn camping and competition—check current spawn rules and grouping etiquette on Wowhead.
